Frequently asked questions about Luxury Property Care in Madeira

Our clear main focus is the long-term supervision of high-end properties for international owners. In addition, we offer selected optional services that can be combined depending on the property and the ownerâ€™s needs.

Property Care

Property Care is the largest and most important service area. It covers the ongoing supervision of high-end villas and apartments in Madeira.

Property Care covers the structured supervision of high-end properties while the owners are away. This includes regular inspections, monitoring of the overall condition, attention to important areas inside and outside the home and reliable preparation before the owners return.

Our Property Care service is intended for luxury villas, modern sea-view residences and high-quality apartments that are not occupied year-round. It is especially relevant for international owners using Madeira as a second-home destination.

The inspection frequency is adapted to the property, its location and the way it is used. A coastal villa in an exposed position may require a different rhythm than an apartment in a more protected setting.

If something relevant is identified during an inspection, we inform the owner in a structured and timely way so that appropriate next steps can be discussed.

Yes. Preparing the property before the owners return is a central part of our Property Care concept. The goal is to ensure that the home feels calm, maintained and ready to use on arrival.

Services

Services are optional add-ons. They complement Property Care whenever owners want additional preparation, care or support beyond the ongoing supervision of the property.

Our services include selected add-ons around high-end properties, such as extra preparation before stays, structured checks of specific areas and premium care that matches the standard of a private residence.

Services are primarily designed as a complement to Property Care. In combination, they create the clearest and most reliable structure for owners who want both ongoing supervision and selected additional support.

Both options are possible. Some owners request them only before specific stays, while others prefer recurring add-on services depending on the property and their expectations.

Storm Check

Storm Check is an optional additional service for owners who want an extra targeted inspection after more demanding weather conditions.

A storm check is a focused additional inspection related to stronger weather situations. It concentrates especially on exterior areas that may be more affected by wind or heavy rain.

It is particularly useful for exposed hillside villas, coastal homes or properties with large outdoor areas, especially when owners are away and want an added level of reassurance.

No. Storm Check is defined as an optional add-on. Property Care remains the main service, while Storm Check is available whenever an owner wants an additional targeted control.

Alojamento Local

Alojamento Local is also an additional service area. Our primary focus remains Luxury Property Care for private high-end residences. AL support is offered only for selected properties where the quality level fits the project.

Yes, but not as the main focus of our business. We support selected Alojamento Local properties when the object, quality expectations and workflow fit our way of working.

The AL area focuses on structured preparation between stays, careful cleaning, quality control and a reliable overall standard for selected high-end holiday properties.

No. The clear main focus remains Luxury Property Care for international owners of private residences. Alojamento Local is an additional optional service for selected properties.

Yes, that can make sense when a property is used partly as a private residence and partly for holiday guests. In such cases the structure must be especially clear and reliable.

We use cookies to operate the website reliably and improve usage. You can accept or decline. Details are in the privacy policy. Privacy
